hero.name: Meryem Sıla Çukur
hero.desc: Hi, I'm Meryem Sıla. I'm a Full Stack Developer who builds end-to-end web applications from frontend to backend. I create scalable, maintainable, and user-focused solutions using modern technologies.

items.name: Frontend Development
items.desc: • JavaScript • HTML/CSS • TailwindCSS • React Query • Redux • AI Integration • Git • Deployment • Testing

items.name: Backend Development
items.desc: • Java • Spring Boot • PostgreSQL • REST API • OOP • AI Integration • Git • Deployment • Testing

items.name: Full Stack Development
items.desc: • System Design • API Design • Database Design • AI Integration • Git • Deployment • Testing

profile.title: Profile
profile.about: I focus on turning user needs into effective software solutions. Working across both frontend and backend technologies, I build scalable, maintainable, and user-centered applications.

items.title: Workintech
items.desc: I completed a 6-month Full Stack Developer training program at Workintech. I developed end-to-end web applications using frontend and backend technologies.

items.title: Portfolio Project
items.desc: A personal portfolio application built with React using Context API for global state management and a custom localStorage hook. Includes fully responsive design with TailwindCSS, TR/EN language support, and API integration via Axios.

items.title: Twitter Clone
items.desc: A Spring Boot REST API secured with JWT authentication and Spring Security. Designed with a layered architecture using DTOs for clean data handling. Implements tweet, comment, like, and retweet functionalities.
